channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Friday, May 1, 2026
item.description: Today's digest has two threads worth treating as urgent. First, the international student funding crisis is hitting Canadian colleges hard — Cambrian's projected $1.7M deficit and 2,000-student loss is a preview of what's coming at institutions across the country, and that financ...
